Akoonkaan cusub eraysirkiisa waxaa ku badali kartaa bogga ''[[Special:ChangePassword|bedel eraysirka]]'' si aad u soo gashid.
newarticletext: Waxaa soo raacday link kula soo xiriiriyay bog oo hadda wali jirin. Si aad u abuurto bogga, qorista ku bilaaw sanduuqa hoose (fiiri [$1 bogga caawinaada] Faahfaahin dheeraad ah). hadii aad meeshaan ku soo qaldantay, riix batoonka barowsahaaga ka noqo
anontalkpagetext: ---- Kani waa bogga wada hadalka ee isticmaalaha qarsoon ee aan wali akoon abuurin, ama aan isticmaalin Sidaa darteed waa inaan isticmaalnaa cinwaanka IP nambarada si loo aqoonsado. Cinwaanka IP-ga noocaas ah waxaa wadaagi kara dhowr isticmaale. Haddii aad tahay isticmaale qarsoon oo aad dareemeesid in faallooyinka aan muhiimka ahayn adiga laguula taliyay, fadlan [[Special:CreateAccount|abuur akoon]] ama [[Special:UserLogin|Soo gal]] si looga fogaado jahwareerka mustaqbalka lala galo isticmaaleyaasha kale ee aan lagaran.
noarticletext: Hada boggaan kama jiro wax qoraal ah. Waad [[Special:Search/{{PAGENAME}}|ka raadin kartaa ciwaanka bogga]] Bogaga kale, [{{fullurl:{{#Special:Log}}|page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}} raadi diiwaanada la xiriira], ama [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} abuur boggaan].
noarticletext-nopermission: Hadda wax qoraal ah malahan boggaan. Waad ka [[Special:Search/{{PAGENAME}}| raadin kartaa cinwaanka boggan]] boggga kale , ama [{{fullurl:{{#Special:Log}}|page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}} raadi diiwaanada laxiriira], balse fasax uma lihid inaad ku samayso boggaan.

session_fail_preview: '''Waan ka xunahay! Kama hawlgalin karin wax ka badalkaaga sabab la xiriita luminta xogta kalfadhiga. Waxaa laga yaabaa in lagaa saaray. Fadlan xaqiiji inaad wali kujirto oo iskuday mar labaad . Hadday wali shaqeyn weydo, isku day [[Special:UserLogout| ka bixida]] oo dib u soo gal, oo iska hubi in browsahaaga oggolaanayo cookies-ka boggan.
session_fail_preview_html: Waan ka xunahay! Kama hawlgalin karin wax ka badalkaaga sabab la xiriita luminta xogta kalfadhiga. Sababtoo ah {{SITENAME}} ayaa leh HTML ceyriin ah, muuqaallada horudhaca ah ayaa loo qariyey sidii looga digtoonaado weerarada JavaScript. Hadii wax ka bedlkaan uu yahay mid xaq ah, fadlan markale isku day. Hadii aysan weli shaqaynin, is kuday inaad [[Special:UserLogout|ka baxdo]] oo markale soo gal, oo iska hubi in oo browsahaaga ogolaanaayo cookies ka boggaan.

copyrightwarning:
Fadlan ogow in dhammaan wax ku biirinta {{SITENAME}} loo tixgelinayo in lagu sii daayay $2 (faahfaahinta eeg $1). Haddii aadan rabin in qoraalkaaga si xor ah loo tafatiro loona qaybsado, markaa halkan ha ku gudbin.
Waxaad sidoo kale noo ballanqaadaysaa inaad adigu qortay tan, ama aad ka soo guurisay meel dadweyne ama ilo xor ah oo la mid ah. Ha gudbin shaqo xuquuq daabacan leh adigoon haysan oggolaansho!

movepagetext: Isticmaalka foomka hoose wuxuu dib u magacaabi doonaa bogga, isagoo dhammaan taariikhdiisii u raraya magaca cusub. Cinwaankii hore wuxuu noqon doonaa bog loo sii gudbiyo cinwaanka cusub. Waxaad si otomaatig ah u cusboonaysiin kartaa tixraacyada tilmaamaya cinwaankii hore. Haddii aad doorato inaadan sidaas sameyn, hubi inaad iska eegto [[Special:DoubleRedirects|tixraacyada labalaabka ah]] ama [[Special:BrokenRedirects|tixraacyada jabsan]]. Adiga ayaa mas'uul ka ah inaad hubiso in xiriiriyeyaashu ay u socdaan meeshii loogu talagalay. Ogsoonaaw in bogga aan la rari doonin haddii uu jiro bog kale oo magaca cusub leh, ilaa uu yahay mid loo sii gudbiyo oo aan lahayn taariikh wax ka beddel hore. Tani waxay ka dhigan tahay inaad bogga dib ugu soo celin karto magaciisii hore haddii aad qalad sameyso, laakiin ma tirtiri kartid bog horay u jiray. Fiiro gaar ah: Tani waxay isbeddel weyn oo lama filaan ah ku noqon kartaa bog caan ah; fadlan iska hubi inaad fahamsan tahay cawaaqibka ka dhalan kara intaadan sii wadin.

movepagetalktext:
Haddii aad calaamadiso sanduuqan, bogga wada hadalka ee la xiriira si toos ah ayaa loogu wareejin doonaa cinwaanka cusub, haddii aanu halkaas hore uga jirin bog wada hadal oo aan madhnayn.

Xaaladdan, waa inaad gacanta ku wareejisaa ama ku mideysaa bogga haddii loo baahdo.
